codeReview.summary: The fix commit addresses all previously blocking scrutiny findings: creator_profile now includes a nullable bio column in db/schema.sql, Story Bank convert now checks PATCH /api/story-bank/[id] before success, and teleprompter files no longer contain inline fontFamily styles.

issues.description: Schema definitions are now inconsistent: db/schema.sql includes creator_profile.bio, but src/lib/schema.sql creator_profile still omits bio. If src/lib/schema.sql is used for setup, this drift can reintroduce schema mismatch.

sharedStateObservations.observation: fullstack-worker procedure requires agent-browser/manual UI verification for UI changes, but this worker session reports only build/lint/grep verification while still marking followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md (Work Procedure step 6) vs transcript skeleton for session a976f160-c68d-4d8c-ae0f-442288a87e5a (no agent-browser tool invocation; verification entries are npm run build, npm run lint, and grep checks).

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is ongoing schema dual-source drift risk between db/schema.sql and src/lib/schema.sql; this fix updated only db/schema.sql, leaving creator_profile definitions out of sync.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: db/schema.sql:14 has 'bio text'; src/lib/schema.sql creator_profile section (lines 7-15) has no bio column.

summary: Pass. The rerun fix fully resolves the three prior blocking issues from scrutiny (creator_profile.bio in db/schema.sql, PATCH-response validation in Story Bank convert flow, and teleprompter inline fontFamily cleanup). One non-blocking concern remains about schema drift in src/lib/schema.sql.
